Tweet by @airesearch12 (Florian S)
Author bio: since age of 6, it's been me & the code. architecting tech for a fortune 500 + a lot of hobby projects (some slightly profitable). currently focusing on ai.
Text: do this to protect yourself against supply chain attacks

$ cat ~/.npmrc
min-release-age=7

$ cat ~/.config/uv/uv.toml
exclude-newer = "7 days" https://t.co/Wve3ujEcCM
